head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: E-42: Camouflage-aware background mixing 8ep probe. Core hypothesis: foreground-background ambiguity (confirmed in E-41.5 for flatfish_2 and white_tailed_ptarmigan) can be reduced by replacing backgrounds during training. For mask-based samples: extract foreground via true mask, composite onto random background from different video. For bbox-only samples: extract bbox region as rectangular foreground. Temporal consistency: same background for all T frames in clip. Probability: 0.5. All other params identical to E-39. If pf_mIoU > E-39 (0.8277) OR flatfish_2/ptarmigan improve, direction is valid for 30ep verification.
